def negative_api_versioning_in_url_without_matching_router_group():
    rule_id = "api_versioning_in_url_without_matching_router_group"
    family = "observability"
    severity = "contextual"
    status = "stable"
    intent = "shows the preferred shape that should not trigger this rule"
    description = "URL path contains a version segment (/v1/) without a corresponding versioned router or blueprint."
    return rule_id, family, severity, status, intent, description
